Key points
----------


<ul><li>Adjusted for exchange rate movements, external liabilities increased by $309.3 billion during 2026 Q1. By region, the largest increase in liabilities was to Advanced Economies ($194.8 billion), where the largest increase by country was against USA ($133.4 billion).</li><li>Adjusted for exchange rate movements, external claims increased by $372.5 billion during 2026 Q1. By region, the largest increase in claims was in Advanced Economies ($320.3 billion), where the largest increase by country was against USA ($203.4 billion).</li></ul>


### Table A: Regional breakdown of external claims and liabilities (US$ billion)



<table><thead><tr><th><p><strong>	  Exchange rate adjusted flows</strong></p></th><th><p><strong>Amounts outstanding</strong></p></th></tr><tr><th><p><strong>Q3</strong></p></th><th><p><strong>Q4</strong></p></th><th><p><strong>Q1</strong></p></th><th><p><strong>End-Mar 2026</strong></p></th></tr><tr><th><p><strong>2025</strong></p></th><th><p><strong>2025</strong></p></th><th><p><strong>2026</strong></p></th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Liabilities to:</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Advanced Economies</p></td><td><p>179.6</p></td><td><p>91.5</p></td><td><p>194.8</p></td><td><p>4,939.0</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Emerging Market and Developing Economies</p></td><td><p>-10.4</p></td><td><p>6.3</p></td><td><p>65.7</p></td><td><p>652.0</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>International Organisations &amp; Other</p></td><td><p>35.5</p></td><td><p>16.3</p></td><td><p>48.8</p></td><td><p>1,171.1</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Total</strong></p></td><td><p>204.7</p></td><td><p>114.0</p></td><td><p>309.3</p></td><td><p>6,762.2</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Claims on:</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Advanced Economies</p></td><td><p>154.1</p></td><td><p>54.5</p></td><td><p>320.3</p></td><td><p>5,861.4</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Emerging Market and Developing Economies</p></td><td><p>24.6</p></td><td><p>19.9</p></td><td><p>30.6</p></td><td><p>575.3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>International Organisations &amp; Other</p></td><td><p>16.6</p></td><td><p>35.5</p></td><td><p>21.6</p></td><td><p>304.8</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Total</strong></p></td><td><p>195.2</p></td><td><p>109.9</p></td><td><p>372.5</p></td><td><p>6,741.5</p></td></tr></tbody></table>
